title: Active Lane View Transition Meter
summary: Added a compact animated stage meter inside the active lane HUD so the mounted view position is visible while switching Overview, Path, Chronicle, Trail, Game, and Comms.
goalFit: Improves the Agent Company Atlas as a premium, game-like command cockpit by making selected path navigation feel continuous without adding another scroll-heavy panel.
proof: web/app.js renders active-lane-view-transition after the view portal dock
web/styles.css animates activeLaneViewRunner across the view meter
web/data/snapshot.json records the unlock in the platform engineering lane after regeneration
